title: opencode-ntfy.sh Configuration
description: Configuration file for the opencode-ntfy.sh plugin, which sends push notifications via ntfy.sh during OpenCode sessions.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for editor validation and autocompletion.

topic.description: The ntfy.sh topic to publish notifications to.

token.description: Bearer token for authentication with the ntfy.sh server.

iconMode.description: Whether the target device uses light or dark mode. Determines which icon variant is used.

iconLight.description: Custom icon URL override for light mode. Must point to a JPEG or PNG image.

iconDark.description: Custom icon URL override for dark mode. Must point to a JPEG or PNG image.

cooldown.description: ISO 8601 duration for notification cooldown (e.g., 'PT30S', 'PT5M'). When set, duplicate notifications for the same event type are suppressed within the cooldown period.

cooldownEdge.description: Which edge of the cooldown window triggers the notification. 'leading' sends immediately and suppresses duplicates. 'trailing' waits for inactivity before sending.

fetchTimeout.description: ISO 8601 duration for the HTTP request timeout when calling the ntfy.sh server (e.g., 'PT10S' for 10 seconds).

events.description: Per-event custom command overrides for notification fields.

eventCommands.description: Custom shell commands whose stdout is used for notification fields.

titleCmd.description: Shell command whose stdout is used as the notification title.

messageCmd.description: Shell command whose stdout is used as the notification message body.

tagsCmd.description: Shell command whose stdout is used as the notification tags.

priorityCmd.description: Shell command whose stdout is used as the notification priority.
